title: tanacetum daghestanicum
intro: Tanacetum daghestanicum, also known as Daghestan tansy, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and native to the Caucasus region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. Its health benefits include relief from digestive problems, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Tanacetum daghestanicum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and wounds.
